texto: The high-minded pursuit of a Jiu Jitsu practitioner pursuing mastery cannot coexist well with the modern world. Our values vary immensely from our contemporaries. This pursuit leaves societal norms slaughtered in our wake. Those who share this journey will praise our efforts
autor: those in the hive will think we have lost it. We must be willing to be misunderstood if we are to understand ourselves.
explicacao: Citação de those in the hive will think we have lost it. We must be willing to be misunderstood if we are to understand ourselves. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The high-minded pursuit of a Jiu Jitsu practitioner pursuing mastery cannot coexist well with the…” articula reflexao, chris-matakas, the-tao-of-jiu-jitsu em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e the-tao-of-jiu-jitsu.
